---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

**Description**

Clear description of the feature you'd like.

**Which axiom does it relate to?**

Which of the five AFS axioms is most relevant? (See CONSTITUTION.md)
- [ ] AGENTIC — machine-readable output, agent-friendly
- [ ] LITE — minimal dependencies, single-purpose
- [ ] SEMANTIC — meaningful names based on content
- [ ] SECURE — CDR, never execute untrusted files
- [ ] VISUAL-ONLY — classification by visual/metadata inspection only

**Use case**

Describe the problem this solves or the workflow it enables.

**Alternatives considered**

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought of.
